title: lobelia baumannii var. kummeriae
intro: Lobelia baumannii var. kummeriae, also known as Kummer's lobelia, is a plant species within the Lobelia genus, characterized by its small stature and vibrant blue flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Lobelia baumannii var. kummeriae include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tea, tinctures, and capsules, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
